wire_contract.require_denied: HTTP 403 application/json {error:'Only space admins, organization admins, and owners can manage this space'}

operations.input: {schema_version,space_id}; userId is never accepted from the caller
operations.failure: missing, foreign, deleted, tombstoned, or stale active-tenant scope returns null

operations.input: {schema_version,space_id}; userId is never accepted from the caller
operations.success: same SpaceAccess object when canManage is true
operations.failure: the two exact pinned source Error messages

role_closure.organization_owner: owner pointer overrides any membership role
role_closure.invalid_member_owner: a non-owner membership role of owner normalizes to member
role_closure.space_creator: creator pointer overrides any space membership role to admin
role_closure.frame_space_role_mapping: manager -> admin; viewer -> member; contributor -> null

authorization_closure.source_residual: Cap accepts caller-supplied userId and spaceId
authorization_closure.frame_correction: actor comes only from the host session; live active organization membership and the immutable legacy space alias are reasserted in every D1 projection query
authorization_closure.non_disclosure: a legacy alias cannot cross the actor's active tenant and tombstoned organizations or deleted spaces project as missing

wire_identity_closure.owner_and_creator: require persisted globally unique legacy_collaboration_user_aliases_v1 rows
wire_identity_closure.imported_users: promote an exact legacy_space_member_aliases_v1 user ID into the global alias authority
wire_identity_closure.native_users: persist a deterministic SHA-256/Crockford candidate with eight bounded collision retries and database uniqueness
wire_identity_closure.read_only_boundary: no business row or idempotency journal is written; only a missing immutable compatibility projection alias may be materialized
